A_basic_context_identifiers.branch_location: 2006 US Highway 1 North, North Brunswick, New Jersey 08902
A_basic_context_identifiers.conversation_summary: The agent, LaToya from Hertz, contacts Barbara Cotton about a replacement rental authorized by Plymouth Insurance. They discuss the availability of a rental pickup, but the branch is closed on weekends past 12:30 PM. A reservation is tentatively set for Monday at 9 AM. Barbara seeks the same vehicle class as her 2020 Nissan Rogue, confined by a $40 per day insurance coverage. The agent informs her she can get a small SUV for a small additional out-of-pocket cost or a premium sedan within her budget. Barbara prefers to convince Plymouth to cover the excess. The agent guides her to call the branch Monday morning with specific instructions.

decision_points: agreeing on who will cover extra costs for the preferred vehicle

C_time_feasibility.customer_stated_timing_need: As soon as possible, initially requesting pickup today.
C_time_feasibility.branch_hours_constraints: Closed over the weekend past 12:30 PM.
infeasibility_reasons: branch was closed after the customer made the inquiry

E_fleet_vehicle_availability.vehicle_class_requested: A vehicle similar to her 2020 Nissan Rogue.

confusion_topics: additional cost for the preferred vehicle class

customer_post_call_actions: Contact Plymouth Insurance regarding additional coverage.
Call the branch Monday morning by 8 AM for a 9 AM appointment.
Confirm vehicle type and additional cost considerations on Monday.
K_outcome_customer_effort.effort_burden_explanation: Requires action to resolve vehicle type/cost issues and calling the branch early on Monday.
